package main

import (
	"flag"
	"fmt"
	"log"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"time"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/driver/postgres"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Positive scenario for main_or_cmd_mixes_cli_parsing_server_bootstrap_and_business_config.
// Rule intent: The main entrypoint should delegate to dedicated startup composition helpers.
// It should not mix CLI flag parsing, server bootstrap, database setup, and business config.
// Anti-pattern: main() does everything: flag parsing, DB connection, business rules, and server start.

func main() {
	// CLI parsing mixed into main
	port := flag.Int("port", 8080, "HTTP server port")
	dbHost := flag.String("db-host", "localhost", "Database host")
	dbPort := flag.Int("db-port", 5432, "Database port")
	dbName := flag.String("db-name", "app", "Database name")
	dbUser := flag.String("db-user", "postgres", "Database user")
	dbPass := flag.String("db-pass", "", "Database password")
	env := flag.String("env", "development", "Environment (development, staging, production)")
	logLevel := flag.String("log-level", "info", "Log level")
	maxRetries := flag.Int("max-retries", 3, "Max retry attempts")
	sessionTimeout := flag.Int("session-timeout", 30, "Session timeout in minutes")
	flag.Parse()

	// Business config mixed into main
	var defaultUserRole string
	var requireEmailVerification bool
	var maxOrdersPerUser int
	var discountRate float64

	switch *env {
	case "production":
		defaultUserRole = "user"
		requireEmailVerification = true
		maxOrdersPerUser = 100
		discountRate = 0.10
	case "staging":
		defaultUserRole = "user"
		requireEmailVerification = true
		maxOrdersPerUser = 50
		discountRate = 0.15
	default:
		defaultUserRole = "admin"
		requireEmailVerification = false
		maxOrdersPerUser = 0
		discountRate = 0.20
	}

	if *logLevel == "debug" {
		gin.SetMode(gin.DebugMode)
	} else {
		gin.SetMode(gin.ReleaseMode)
	}

	// Server bootstrap mixed into main
	dsn := fmt.Sprintf("host=%s port=%d user=%s password=%s dbname=%s sslmode=disable",
		*dbHost, *dbPort, *dbUser, *dbPass, *dbName)

	db, err := gorm.Open(postgres.Open(dsn), &gorm.Config{})
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatalf("failed to connect to database: %v", err)
	}

	sqlDB, err := db.DB()
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatalf("failed to get sql.DB: %v", err)
	}
	sqlDB.SetMaxOpenConns(25)
	sqlDB.SetMaxIdleConns(5)
	sqlDB.SetConnMaxLifetime(5 * time.Minute)

	// More business config mixed into main
	os.Setenv("DEFAULT_USER_ROLE", defaultUserRole)
	os.Setenv("REQUIRE_EMAIL_VERIFICATION", fmt.Sprintf("%t", requireEmailVerification))
	os.Setenv("MAX_ORDERS_PER_USER", fmt.Sprintf("%d", maxOrdersPerUser))
	os.Setenv("DISCOUNT_RATE", fmt.Sprintf("%.2f", discountRate))

	// Router setup mixed into main
	r := gin.Default()

	r.GET("/health", func(c *gin.Context) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "ok"})
	})

	r.GET("/config", func(c *gin.Context) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{
			"env":                    *env,
			"default_user_role":      defaultUserRole,
			"require_email_verify":   requireEmailVerification,
			"max_orders_per_user":    maxOrdersPerUser,
			"discount_rate":          discountRate,
			"session_timeout_min":    *sessionTimeout,
		})
	})

	// Server start mixed into main
	addr := fmt.Sprintf(":%d", *port)
	log.Printf("starting server on %s (env=%s, db=%s:%d/%s)",
		addr, *env, *dbHost, *dbPort, *dbName)

	if err := r.Run(addr); err != nil {
		log.Fatalf("server failed: %v", err)
	}
}
